scripts.predev: node scripts/print-dev-urls.mjs && node scripts/free-dev-ports.mjs && node scripts/clean-next.mjs && node scripts/check-ports.mjs
scripts.dev:tui: concurrently -n api,admin,web,pos -c cyan,magenta,green,yellow "pnpm --filter @africatourismgate/api dev" "pnpm --filter @africatourismgate/admin dev" "pnpm --filter @africatourismgate/web dev" "pnpm --filter @africatourismgate/pos dev"
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n api,admin,web,pos -c cyan,magenta,green,yellow "pnpm --filter @africatourismgate/api start" "pnpm --filter @africatourismgate/admin start" "pnpm --filter @africatourismgate/web start" "pnpm --filter @africatourismgate/pos start"
